title: phyllanthus tararae
intro: Phyllanthus tararae, also known as Tararae or Makapuno, is a small, perennial plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus tararae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and the seeds are used to make herbal infusions or tinctures for various health purposes.
